name_en: 🆕 Chip Version Top Original M41937 Pink. Made from top-grain cowhide! The Rosalie coin purse features Monogram and Monogram Reverse canvas, with a smooth snap closure and rounded flap. It includes an interior slip pocket, zip coin pocket, card slots, and back pocket.
name_cn:
🆕 Chip Version Top Original M41937 Pink. Made from top-grain cowhide! The Rosalie coin purse features Monogram and Monogram Reverse canvas, with a smooth snap closure and rounded flap. It includes an interior slip pocket, zip coin pocket, card slots, and back pocket.
Size: 11 x 8 x 2.5 cm.
